title: Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) (Remote)
description: Role : Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) (Remote) Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type : Full-Time Payout : $230K - $280K/yr Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) - US to work on a full-time basis. The role involves building and maintaining scalable web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks and backend services. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions. Key Responsibilities: • Develop and optimize full-stack applications using React.js for frontend and Node.js for backend services. • Design and implement RESTful APIs and database schemas to support application functionality. • Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code while adhering to best practices and coding standards. • Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues across the stack to ensure system reliability. • Participate in code reviews, architectural discussions, and sprint planning to drive continuous improvement. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in React.js and Node.js with a strong understanding of their ecosystems. • Experience with frontend technologies such as HTML5, CSS3, and modern JavaScript (ES6+). • Familiarity with backend frameworks like Express.js and database systems such as PostgreSQL or MongoDB. • Knowledge of version control systems, particularly Git, and CI/CD pipelines. • Experience with testing frameworks (Jest, Mocha) and debugging tools. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of mission-critical applications. The position provides exposure to cutting-edge technologies and collaborative problem-solving in a distributed team environment. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Backend Engineer | $42/hr Remote
description: Position: Backend Engineer (JSON Schema Developer) Type: Hourly contract Compensation: $40 - $42/hour Location: Remote Commitment: 10 40 hours/week Role Responsibilities Analyze complex documents to identify and model structured data points. Design and implement robust JSON schemas with appropriate field types and structure. Define validation rules, constraints, and logical relationships within schemas. Develop API contracts to ensure seamless data integration across systems. Collaborate with stakeholders to refine data requirements and schema design. Document schema structures, field definitions, and usage guidelines clearly. Promote best practices in data modeling, architecture, and scalability. Requirements Strong experience in data modeling, schema design, and JSON schema development. Expertise in creating deeply nested and scalable data structures. Strong understanding of validation logic, field typing, and schema constraints. Ability to translate unstructured data into structured models. Experience defining API contracts and data integration workflows. Excellent written and verbal communication skills. Ability to work independently in a remote, distributed environment. Application Process (Takes 20 Min) Easy Apply on LinkedIn Check email for next steps Participate in resume evaluation & interview stage

title: Senior Backend Engineer - Node.js & AWS (Remote)
description: Role : Senior Backend Engineer - Node.js & AWS (Remote) Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type : Contract Payout : $20 - $70/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Senior Backend Engineer (Node.js, AWS) to work on a contract basis. The role involves designing, developing, and maintaining scalable backend services for a high-traffic platform. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver efficient, low-latency solutions in a cloud-native environment. Key Responsibilities: • Design, build, and deploy Node.js-based microservices using AWS services. • Optimize backend systems for performance, scalability, and reliability. • Implement RESTful and GraphQL APIs with a focus on security and efficiency. • Lead architectural decisions for cloud infrastructure, including EC2, Lambda, and RDS. • Monitor system health, debug issues, and implement automated testing and CI/CD pipelines. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Minimum 5 years of experience with Node.js backend development. • Strong proficiency in AWS services such as EC2, Lambda, S3, RDS, and CloudFormation. • Experience with RESTful and GraphQL API design and implementation. • Familiarity with containerization (Docker) and orchestration (Kubernetes or ECS). • Knowledge of databases, including PostgreSQL, MongoDB, or DynamoDB. • Experience with automated testing (unit, integration, and end-to-end). • Understanding of CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure-as-code tools like Terraform. • Ability to work independently in a remote, distributed team environment. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of a platform serving millions of users worldwide. The contract includes competitive compensation and flexibility to work from anywhere. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!
